title: Opinion: Opinion | What's Behind Araghchi's Visit To China Right Before Trump-Xi Meeting?
summary_full: Beijing remains indispensable to Tehran as an economic backer and diplomatic shield, but it is not prepared to become its war ally.
summary_public: Beijing remains indispensable to Tehran as an economic backer and diplomatic shield, but it is not prepared to become its war ally.
